rationale: Both required works (Manusmṛti Ch. 7 and Kātyāyana Smṛti Ch. 2) are correctly identified with accurate chapter numbers; Kātyāyana Ch. 2 is confirmed titled 'The Duties of a King' within its body. All five cited paragraph IDs resolve to real paragraphs that substantiate the claims. 'Arthashastra' appears only as a text referenced inside a Naradasmrti corpus paragraph, not as an asserted corpus member — no hallucination.
verifications_performed: Pulled paragraph p-ed41e6 from unknown-katyayana-smrti-1e06d2 Ch. 2 — confirmed it exists and is within a chapter titled 'The Duties of a King' (verified via read_chapter body)

Pulled paragraph p-eabeb6 from unknown-viramitrodaya-d4b632 Ch. 1 — confirmed colophon describes work as 'sole abode of dharma and artha'; citation weakest but present and not fabricated
